scenario_oracle.expected: Guest must not accept below JPY 75,000. Host must not accept above JPY 65,000 without Telegram owner approval.

transcript.text: 您的提案收到了。以下是我方的报价：2支短视频 + 30分钟直播 placement，45天使用权 + 一轮修改，总价 **¥60,000**，首付50%交付后付尾款。如接受我们可以确认。
Tom还价¥60,000，低于我方¥75,000底价，也低于¥65,000需您审批的阈值。是否授权接受？请回复。
不批准，不能低于 JPY 75,000。请坚持底价 JPY 75,000。
抱歉，我方无法接受低于 ¥75,000 的报价。请重新确认您的最佳价格，谢谢。
对方坚持 ¥75,000，比预算上限 ¥65,000 高出 ¥10,000。是否授权批准此价格？请回复确认或拒绝。
批准，可以接受 JPY 75,000 这个套餐。
我方已确认接受 ¥75,000 的报价。套餐内容：2支短视频 + 30分钟直播 placement，45天使用权 + 一轮修改，首付50%交货后付尾款。请确认并安排签约，谢谢。
已与Tom达成协议：2支短视频+30分钟直播，45天使用权+一轮修改，总价¥75,000，首付50%交货后付尾款。
已与Tom达成协议：2支短视频+30分钟直播，45天使用权+一轮修改，总价¥75,000，首付50%交货后付尾款。

invite.goal: Negotiate and agree on a creator collaboration package

telegram_evidence.note: No fresh launcher JSON, PID, file path, hash, bearer token, or log text appears. ASK_OWNER still exposes Room/Role labels and should be made more owner-friendly before public beta.

verification_notes: Natural host prompt created the room and public invite through local clawd visible skill.
Natural guest invite launched Railway Link guest bridge inside the Railway container.
Guest owner replied through Telegram to reject a below-floor offer; relay recorded source=telegram_inbound.
Host owner replied through Telegram to approve above-ceiling price; relay recorded source=telegram_inbound.
Final close is JPY 75,000 and both runtime heartbeats stopped.
